text:
{
  "isSuspicious": true,
  "deviation": "The process netsh.exe, spawned by powershell.exe, is adding an inbound firewall rule to allow a Python executable located in the user's AppData directory. While netsh.exe is a legitimate tool, this specific command line (allowing an executable from a user's AppData path) is a common tactic used by malware or malicious scripts to bypass firewall restrictions and establish persistence or communication.",
  "indicators": [
    "netsh.exe",
    "advfirewall",
    "add rule",
    "dir=in",
    "action=allow",
    "program=C:\\users\\wardog\\appdata\\local\\programs\\python\\python39\\python.exe",
    "powershell.exe parent"
  ]
}
